heading: Retro Games, Mobile Apps & Software Development
intro: Welcome to BarkinMad Studios, an independent UK software and game development studio creating retro-inspired arcade games, mobile apps, business software, and digital solutions for iPhone, iPad, and the web.

hero.alt: Retro arcade gaming and software development workspace at BarkinMad Studios

featuredProducts.title: The Game of Darts
featuredProducts.description: A modern darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad, featuring fast score entry, detailed player statistics, match history, and multiple game modes.

featuredProducts.title: ZXSnake
featuredProducts.description: A modern take on the classic Snake arcade game, featuring achievements, leaderboards, AI opponents, multiplayer modes, and shared ZX Series progression.

featuredProducts.title: StudioDash
featuredProducts.description: An analytics and business intelligence platform that brings app performance, revenue, traffic, and operational insights together in one native workspace for independent developers.

servicesSection.title: Software & Development Services
servicesSection.intro: Practical software solutions for businesses looking to build apps, streamline workflows, develop prototypes, or create modern digital platforms.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.summary: Tailored software designed around your business processes, workflows, and long-term goals.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.summary: Native iPhone and iPad application development from concept through to App Store release.

items.title: Internal Business Tools
items.summary: Dashboards, workflow systems, reporting tools, and business applications designed around the way your team works.

zxSeriesSection.title: ZX Series
zxSeriesSection.intro: A connected collection of retro-inspired arcade games with shared achievements, progression, and rewards.

sections.title: Retro Arcade Games
sections.description: Discover the growing [ZX Series](/zx-series), where classic arcade gameplay meets modern features including achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer modes, and shared progression.

sections.title: Mobile Apps
sections.description: Explore our growing collection of [apps](/apps), from retro arcade games and score tracking tools to developer utilities and future software projects for iPhone and iPad.

sections.title: Software Development Services
sections.description: From [custom software development](/services/custom-software-development) and [mobile apps](/services/mobile-app-development) to [internal business tools](/services/internal-business-tools), workflow automation, websites, and prototypes, we help turn ideas into practical software solutions.

sections.title: About BarkinMad Studios
sections.description: Learn more about our background, development approach, public products, and long-term vision for creating games, applications, and software that people enjoy using.
